title: antirrhinum majus var. ottomanum
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. ottomanum, also known as the 'Lipstick Plant' or 'Ottomanum Snap Dragon', is a perennial variety of the Antirrhinum majus plant, characterized by its evergreen, velvety leaves and vibrant, pink or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus var. ottomanum include its ability to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in aromatherapy to promote a sense of calm and well-being.
